text: I've been to Movado before, but what makes this store special is Tony. He is amazing and patient and knows what customer service means. The collection here is good and so are the discounts
Great customer service. Customer service is everything in sells and this stores has it. Went above and beyond what I need. I really appreciate the effort.

I had a great experience shopping at the Movado store in Wrentham Outlet thanks to Tony. He was very professional, patient, and knowledgeable about the watches. He took the time to help me find the perfect watch without making me feel pressured. His customer service was excellent, and he made the whole experience enjoyable. If you visit the store, I highly recommend asking for Tony!
Tony helped me identify my watch and get in contact with the right people to repair it. Above and beyond customer service.

What a great experience! Tony really runs a good store, many many watches to choose from and when you have an interest in one, the whole store helps you feel good about your choice. We have gotten several watches there and highly recommend you stop by and see Tony!

Bought a watch from this store and from Tony beautiful watch but great service from the moment I walked in treated me with kindness and respect the whole time. He ordered me the right box that came with the watch great guy.
Amazing customer service. Beautiful watch for a great price!
I was referred to this store by another jeweler. It was the best advice ever! Tony was amazing, honest and a true gentleman. A pleasure to work with and I look forward to my next purchase with Tony!
Shout out to Tony!! Gave me a heads up on a combo deal 🤌🏿🙏🏿💪🏿

My daughter and I bought mommy daughter watches for our birthdays 🎂 Tony was soooo good to us patient and very knowledgeable! We were happy with our purchases my daughter had her watch sized as well store staff  very friendly

Overpriced junk, I went to replace the battery and the metal tab snapped off , I have invicta watches that cost a fraction of a movado, and the craftsmanship is superior, I would recommend or buy another movado😡

Had a price discrepancy with a quote and listing price of a watch I was interested in. I reached out to the manager Michael who was extremely helpful. From the moment he took the call he was reasonable and understanding. He was able to honor the price and I obtained the watch I wanted. Excellent management, knowledgeable, and customer oriented. Thank you!

The Movado store is a must visit every time we are at Wrentham Outlet.  This time, the deals were incredible, not only on their products but also their related brands like Ebel, Coach, Tommy Hilfiger, and others.  We left with three new watches and were very happy with the sales help we received.

I ordered a watch (coach) online and received it very fast. The watch was so beautiful and since I have a small wrist, I needed to resize it so when I called the store in Wrentham, they were so friendly and said to stop by and they would take care of me. The next day, I went to their store in Wrentham, MA, and in less than five minutes, I was on my way wearing my beautiful watch with a big smile. I'm truly happy with the merchandise, which was 60% off, and the customer service was 100% excellent. I highly recommend it.

Save your money. Don’t buy a Movado unless you don’t mind it sitting in your junk drawer. Purchased a watch and brought it to get the battery changed and they couldn’t do it. Lol.  Was told I have to email and they will send me a box to ship it back for a battery swap out. The store can’t do it because it needs to be sealed correctly.  Wait! What! Do you honestly think I’m going to do this once a year? Wish I knew this before I bought it. Come on Movado. This is just terrible that your stores cannot change a battery. Won’t ever buy or recommend a Movado again.
Scored some good deals on Concord watches. People that work here are very friendly.

Drove all the way from Boston the store was closed I called on the phone to find out if they had the watch I was looking for. Still look like it was empty here's the hours of operation on the door the worst feeling in the world to drive-through all this traffic in the hot day Would never come back

Was prepared to spend up to $1,000 in this location. Upon entry, I was curtly shoe’d to the other associate for Movado pieces. The associate wouldn’t even look at myself and my company. Just pointed over to another counter/associate. That was the best part of my experience here. As soon as conversation began with the “movado associate” (middle aged male salt and pepper hair); he begun preaching religion to my friend. Adding that she as a woman was created from Adam’s rib. So on and so forth. The kicker came when I mentioned getting my husband an anniversary gift (peep my name on the review and you’ll see my husband and I are both men). The associate immediately walked away and began mumbling with the first associate I spoke with. I promptly left but the experience hasn’t gone over well with me or the friend I’d arrived with. I’d like to think these companies are better and more inclusive than this. Very sad.
Found great deals here and got 2 watches for work

I love it when you go into a store and you’re not being rushed or hustled to buy anything. I was greeted by store manager Brian N Bardsley Who happened to be very helpful, kind and very knowledgeable about watches. I purchase a nice beautiful ladies watch and thanks to Brian I will keep doing my shopping at that location…

If you are looking for a quality watch and don't want to be overwhelmed by staff talking you into buying more than you need, this is the place to go. Staff will answer your questions, listen to you describe the watch you want, and will steer you to a watch that fits your needs and your wallet.
Good people  ,reasonable price
As always, great experience and fantastic well priced watches
Amazing service. They even stayed late to help us!!

Alejandra was amazing! She was very friendly, helpful, and made the whole experience easy and enjoyable. She really knows the products and took her time to help me choose the perfect watch. I left very happy with my purchase.
I visited MOVADO with my wife and our experience was fantastic. The manager, Kayyim, was extremely attentive throughout our visit. We 100% recommend this store.

The store experience was great. I bought a new watch and I was really impressed with the service and the cleanliness of the store. I was assisted by the store manager, Kayyim who was so friendly and knowledgeable.

Horrible store manager and store operator!! He was so rude and we had the worst experience with him. Store manager does not care about customer service. I requested to talk to him many  times as the new watches I had bought from the store had scratches. He never came out to talk, and instead the other store operator who was not the store manager kept saying " I am the manager". He made non stop faces at us, expressing frustration over our request to address the issue with scratches. Help yourself by not visiting this store and go to other locations. Worst customer service ever.

Went there for a new band and a battery for a watch I’ve had over 20 yrs. The store had an uncomfortable feeling and I was told they did not have a band and couldn’t replace the battery because they might break the glass or some nonsense and I needed to send it to Movado Customer Service (they did give me a phone number). Instead,  I drove 20 minutes the other Orlando Movado store and was met with a friendly, welcoming staff and left with a new watch band and a new battery.
Great service

I recently had one of the worst retail experiences at a Movado store. We visited the store approximately 25 minutes before closing and were assisted by a sales associate. Unfortunately, his behavior was shockingly unprofessional from the start.  He appeared visibly disinterested, made unpleasant facial expressions, and showed no enthusiasm in helping us or providing any information about the watches. A few minutes into the interaction, he told us—in a very rude tone—that the store closes at 7:00 PM. We acknowledged this politely. However, he repeated the same statement shortly afterward, even though it was still not yet 7:00.  Despite this, we decided to proceed with a purchase and requested that the watch be cleaned, as it was covered in fingerprints. To our surprise, the associate responded with, “Just buy and get out.” When we asked him to repeat what he said, he simply smiled without saying another word.  As someone who has previously worked with Movado for over two years, I can confidently say this is not the level of customer service the brand stands for. We never rushed customers out of the store, even at closing time. This associate’s behavior not only reflects poorly on the store but significantly tarnishes the Movado brand image.  I sincerely hope management addresses this incident and takes appropriate action to ensure no other customer has to experience such treatment.  Unfortunately
Thank you. To Alejandra. Pleasant and attentive

This review is a few weeks overdue and I couldn’t put it off any longer!  Early January, I purchased a Movado watch online as a birthday gift.  In my excitement of the purchase I neglected to have the watch inscribed.  Upon receiving it I was even more confident I had to take it to a local distributor to have it personalized for my partner.  Being that I was pressed for time I took it to the closest Movado store which is located at the Vineland Outlets in Orlando.  The staff was absolutely wonderful and very friendly!  John and Dionne attended to me very quickly.  They assured me the inscription could get done while I waited.  Unfortunately, there was an issue with the machine that caused other issues.  However, this incredible staff came together and made it all right!  The store Manager, Mr. Khan came to greet me and reassured me he would do everything in his power to get me the watch back by my partners bday.  His word was honored and for me that is everything!!  Huge Thank you to Mr. Khan, Dionne, John and the team over at Movado Vineland Outlets for making my experience an absolute amazing one.  Outstanding customer service and I will definitely be going back for another purchase.  Also, my partner was elated with his gift and was very touched by the inscription!  Thank you Movado Vineland Team!  You made the experience exceptional!  Much success to you!  -JC

A watch store that is supposed to open at 10am but is late. We left at 10:07am and they never opened. There were two employees inside waving us away. I’ll buy the 4 watches I’m looking for at the other location!
Had a issue with a ceramic movado I purchased ,Movado service was giving  me the run around but Kayyim made sure I was fully  taking care of. A real stand up guy.

Paula was an exceptional customer-centric individual. She exemplifies excellence, not just in providing services to customers, but also you can clearly see her willingness to help an individual. Thank you, Paula!
Staff was awesome she helped me without an attitude.I didn’t get her name but she was wearing a blue jacket😊
Excelente experiencia de compra, fuimos dos veces y agradecemos la honestidad y atención de sus ejecutivos tienen la cordialidad necesaria de mostrar todo sin presionar te a comprar. Buenas ofertas

I have bought 5 of my 7 watches here, and I will continue to. There are no returns because of the deep discounts. That being said i have had no issues with any of the watches I have purchased. They do have plenty of selection of watches not just Movado. I personally like Movado so im very pleased with the selection and the prices. If you are fortunate enough to be there when the have 70% just buy it LOL

I have shopped here and got my battery replaced here a couple of times and they always do a fantastic job. They are very reasonably priced when it comes to changing the battery. The prices at the store can not be beat either. Today Kayyim helped me out when the back of my watch came off after dropping it. He was very professional and customer service oriented. He is a huge asset to the company. Thanks again for your help.

Fool me once. Shame on me. Service was horrible the first time, but for the love of Mogadishu moved past it. One of the watches I bought had a link break 2 months after I bought it. They basically told me to get lost and call the 1(800) number. Done with this store and brand ! PS. If you want them to change your battery it’s $45. JSYK. Also if you like getting treated like chop liver u will love it here.
Great
Fine.
